sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 375 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 484/17 (exemption) 2. For hearing of main case. 17.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for applicant. This reference is pending since 2017 and despite passage of eight years, even notice has not been issued in this matter till date. Today, learned counsel remains unable to assist and merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
